prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 flash-photography fashion nightlife shot in a luxurious dim lounge or hotel lobby, tilted with a dynamic Dutch angle and a gritty disposable-camera look. The subject is a curvy young woman posing full-body slightly off-center, walking toward the camera with one arm raised behind her head; her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft square blur. She has long dark wavy hair and wears an all-white streetwear outfit consisting of exactly 5 visible clothing pieces: a tight low-cut crop tank top, an open lightweight knit cardigan, loose white cargo pants, white sneakers, and a gold chain belt draped across the waist. Include exactly 3 visible accessories: a delicate gold necklace, large hoop earrings, and a small navel piercing. The background should be a glossy dark floor reflecting warm lights, a bar or lounge interior with golden ambient lighting, a small glowing screen on the left wall, and a tall vase of vivid purple flowers on the right. Add a huge hand-painted white brush-script word Beautiful! across the top third of the image, with an energetic underline stroke beneath it, like a bold marker or paint pen. Use high contrast, motion blur, slight grain, oversaturated warm highlights, deep shadows, and paparazzi-style direct flash. Customize the outfit color with white, the belt color with gold, the background setting with luxury nightlife lounge, and the flower color with purple. Keep the composition vertical, glamorous, candid, and editorial; no extra text, no watermark.
